Co,DocNbr,PK,GL,GLdesc,Doc Amt - Display,GL Prefix,Text,PC,CC,TP,ProdCode,UWYR,AccYr,ReinName,ReinLoc,BusCat,Contract,CatCode,RiskTerr,Broker,PTF,Stat,TransCode,TTY,Doc Amt
Co, GL, PC
y
update TransX set GL = substring(GL,1,3) + '8901' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL < '6000000' and not GL like '%99998'
update TransX set GL = '5328901' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '5348901'
update TransX set PC = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '6%'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, PC, CC, Amt1, Flex1) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, PC, CC, round(-sum(Amt1),2) as Amt1, 'pass1' as Flex1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Co, GL, PC, CC)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0
update TransX set BusCat = '31', TP = 'FF001' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set BusCat = '', TP = '' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL Like '6%'
insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, PC, CC, TP, BusCat, Amt1) (Select KeyID, Co, GL, PC, CC, 'F0001' as TP, BusCat, round(-Amt1,2) as Amt1 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]')
update TransX set PC = (case when Co = '2001' then '3' else '1' end) + substring(PC,2,9) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'F0001' and PC <> ''

update TransX set CC = (case when Co = '2001' then '3' else (case when substring(CC,1,5) = '6USU9' then '4' else '1' end) end) + substring(CC,2,9) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TP = 'F0001' and CC <> ''
update TransX set GL = '5518900' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL = '5518901'
update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and ReinsType = 0
update TransX set ProdCode = 'UNKNOWN' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Product = 1
update TransX set UWYR = '[year]' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and UWYear = 1
update TransX set AccYr = '[year]' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and AccidentYear = 1
update TransX set ReinLoc = 'UNKN' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and InsurerLocation = 1
update TransX set RiskTerr = 'UNKN' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and RiskLocation = 1
update TransX set Broker = 'UNKNOWN' from TransX t inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation v on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and v.Broker = 1
update TransX set ReinName = 'UNKNOWN' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Cedant = 1
update TransX set TransCode = 'T9999' from TransX inner join [GFS].dbo.FSGValidation v on GL = GLAccount where KeyID = '[batchID]' and v.TransCode = 1
update TransX set Amt2 = ABS(Amt1) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set PK = '40' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 > 0
update TransX set PK = '50' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 < 0
update TransX set Flex4 = substring(GL,1,3) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex4 = '600' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '6%'
update TransX set Contract = 'FIRV', Txt = 'FIRV true-up', GLdesc = '', Stat = '', CatCode = '', PTF = '', Flex6 = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set PC = '', TP = '', BusCat = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL like '6%'
insert into TransX (KeyID, Co, GL, PC, CC, Amt1) values ('[batchID]',
